message:
chore(test-utils): improve error logging and fix JSDoc example

e2e-logging.ts:
- Enhanced withStep() error logging to include full error context
- Previously: logged only error.message as a string
- Now: logs structured object with name, message, and stack trace
- Enables better debugging of E2E test failures by preserving
  the complete error context including stack traces

request-helpers.ts:
- Fixed incorrect JSDoc example in setupAgentMailTestEnv documentation
- Changed server.port to server.getPort() to match actual API
- The AgentMailTestServer class uses a getter method, not a property

These changes improve developer experience when debugging test failures
and ensure documentation accurately reflects the API.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
